meta.title: Plastic Surgery Practice Software | Cosmetic Flow & Reconstructive Coordination | clinIQ
meta.description: Complete guide to plastic surgery practice operations. Cosmetic patient experience. Reconstructive coordination. Photography management. Post-op tracking.

hero.subhead: Your cosmetic patients expect premium experience. Your reconstructive cases need coordination. Your photography needs organization. clinIQ delivers cosmetic excellence, coordinates reconstructive care, and manages surgical workflows.

sections.content:
Plastic surgery practices run two distinct operations: elective cosmetic and insurance-based reconstructive.

**The cosmetic differentiation:**

Cosmetic patients are choosing you. They expect premium experience from consultation through recovery. The experience IS the product.

**The reconstructive complexity:**

Breast reconstruction, hand surgery, complex wounds — each has different authorization, coordination, and follow-up requirements.

**What clinIQ does:**

Private check-in: No shared waiting rooms with medical patients.

Consultation tracking: Inquiry → consultation → quote → booking → surgery.

Conversion analytics: Which consultations convert? Why do others not?

Patient communication: Pre-op and post-op communication sequences.

Reconstructive surgery requires coordination with other specialties.

**What clinIQ does:**

Multidisciplinary tracking: Breast surgery with oncology, hand surgery with ortho, etc.

Authorization tracking: Reconstructive procedures often need auth.

Pre-op coordination: Medical clearance, imaging, other workup.

Before/after photography is essential for plastic surgery.

**What clinIQ does:**

Photo organization: Photos by patient, by procedure, by date.

Consent tracking: Photo consent documented.

Before/after pairing: Matching photos for comparison.

Plastic surgery has extended post-op courses.

**What clinIQ does:**

Post-op schedule: Day 1, week 1, week 2, etc. tracked.

Complication monitoring: Hematoma, infection, wound issues flagged.

Satisfaction tracking: Patient satisfaction documented.

**Week 1-2:** Cosmetic flow, reconstructive coordination, photography configured.

**ROI:** Consultation conversion improves. Premium experience differentiates.

**Investment:** Professional $499/month. Implementation $750 one-time.

faqs.q: Does this separate cosmetic and reconstructive?
faqs.a: Yes. Different workflows, different patient experiences, different tracking.
Organized by patient, procedure, date. Consent tracked. Before/after paired.

testimonial.quote: Cosmetic consultations convert 40% better now. The experience sells itself.
